name: Secret Chocolat Sensation
recipeIngredient: 1 package Chocolate cake mix (with pudding in the mix)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour two 9-inch layer cake pans.
3. In a large bowl, blend all ingredients with a mixer at low speed for 30 seconds.
4. Beat the mixture on medium speed for 2 minutes.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pans.
6. Bake for 30 to 35 minutes, or until the cake pulls away from the sides of the pans and springs back when lightly touched in the center.
7. Allow the cakes to cool in the pans for 10 minutes.
8. Remove the cakes from the pans and let them cool on wire racks.
9. Fill and frost as desired.
MARGARET ARTURI (DVNU21A)
